---
title: "Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic"
---

# Control Flow, Coordination, and Temporal Logic

Range: `0512-0608`.

## Completion

| Status      | Count |
| ----------- | ----- |
| authored    | 18    |
| stub        | 78    |
| needs_sense | 1     |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| Sigil | Term                                  | Completion  | Summary                                                                                                                                       |
| ----- | ------------------------------------- | ----------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 0512  | `STUB` [abort](#rune-0512)            | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0513  | `STUB` [acknowledge](#rune-0513)      | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0514  | [async](#rune-0514)                   | authored    | Work may proceed without immediate blocking at the call site.                                                                                 |
| 0515  | [await](#rune-0515)                   | authored    | Pause until an asynchronous result becomes ready.                                                                                             |
| 0516  | [backoff {Ctrl}](#rune-0516)          | authored    | Wait longer between retries so recovery does not become attack.                                                                               |
| 0517  | [barrier {Ctrl}](#rune-0517)          | authored    | A synchronization point no participant may cross early.                                                                                       |
| 0518  | `STUB` [block {Ctrl}](#rune-0518)     | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0519  | `STUB` [branch {Ctrl}](#rune-0519)    | stub        | A divergence word; execution or history splits into alternate paths.                                                                          |
| 0520  | `STUB` [break](#rune-0520)            | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0521  | `STUB` [callback](#rune-0521)         | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0522  | `STUB` [cancel](#rune-0522)           | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0523  | `STUB` [case](#rune-0523)             | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0524  | `STUB` [catch](#rune-0524)            | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0525  | `STUB` [chain](#rune-0525)            | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0526  | `STUB` [choose](#rune-0526)           | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0527  | [circuit breaker](#rune-0527)         | authored    | Trip open after repeated failure to prevent repeated harm.                                                                                    |
| 0528  | `STUB` [clause](#rune-0528)           | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0529  | `STUB` [continue](#rune-0529)         | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0530  | [coroutine](#rune-0530)               | authored    | A suspendable routine that can yield and later resume.                                                                                        |
| 0531  | `STUB` [countdown](#rune-0531)        | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0532  | `STUB` [cycle](#rune-0532)            | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0533  | `STUB` [debounce](#rune-0533)         | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0534  | `STUB` [defer {Ctrl}](#rune-0534)     | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0535  | `STUB` [delay](#rune-0535)            | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0536  | `STUB` [dispatch {Ctrl}](#rune-0536)  | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0537  | `STUB` [do](#rune-0537)               | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0538  | `STUB` [else](#rune-0538)             | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0539  | [enqueue](#rune-0539)                 | authored    | Place work onto a queue for later handling.                                                                                                   |
| 0540  | [event loop](#rune-0540)              | authored    | The scheduler that drives nonblocking tasks and callbacks.                                                                                    |
| 0541  | `STUB` [fallback {Ctrl}](#rune-0541)  | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0542  | `STUB` [fan-in](#rune-0542)           | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0543  | `STUB` [fan-out {Ctrl}](#rune-0543)   | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0544  | `STUB` [finally](#rune-0544)          | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0545  | `STUB` [fire-and-forget](#rune-0545)  | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0546  | [flow control](#rune-0546)            | authored    | Mechanisms that keep producers from outrunning consumers.                                                                                     |
| 0547  | `STUB` [for](#rune-0547)              | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0548  | `STUB` [fork {Ctrl}](#rune-0548)      | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0549  | [future](#rune-0549)                  | authored    | A placeholder for a value that will exist later.                                                                                              |
| 0550  | [gate](#rune-0550)                    | needs_sense | A permission word; passage occurs only when conditions hold.                                                                                  |
| 0551  | `STUB` [guard](#rune-0551)            | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0552  | `STUB` [halt](#rune-0552)             | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0553  | `STUB` [heartbeat {Ctrl}](#rune-0553) | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0554  | `STUB` [if](#rune-0554)               | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0555  | `STUB` [iterate](#rune-0555)          | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0556  | `STUB` [join {Ctrl}](#rune-0556)      | stub        | A union word; separate streams, sets, or histories are brought into one result.                                                               |
| 0557  | `STUB` [jump](#rune-0557)             | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0558  | `STUB` [latch](#rune-0558)            | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0559  | `STUB` [loop](#rune-0559)             | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0560  | `STUB` [match](#rune-0560)            | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0561  | [mutex](#rune-0561)                   | authored    | Mutual exclusion for one critical region at a time.                                                                                           |
| 0562  | `STUB` [notify](#rune-0562)           | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0563  | `STUB` [once](#rune-0563)             | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0564  | `STUB` [parallel {Ctrl}](#rune-0564)  | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0565  | `STUB` [pause](#rune-0565)            | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0566  | `STUB` [poll {Ctrl}](#rune-0566)      | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0567  | `STUB` [preempt](#rune-0567)          | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0568  | `STUB` [priority](#rune-0568)         | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0569  | `STUB` [process {Ctrl}](#rune-0569)   | stub        | A sovereignty word; an executing program with its own protected address space.                                                                |
| 0570  | `STUB` [promise](#rune-0570)          | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0571  | [queue {Ctrl}](#rune-0571)            | authored    | Ordered holding area that decouples production from consumption.                                                                              |
| 0572  | `STUB` [race window](#rune-0572)      | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0573  | `STUB` [recurse](#rune-0573)          | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0574  | `STUB` [repeat](#rune-0574)           | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0575  | `STUB` [reserve](#rune-0575)          | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0576  | [retry {Ctrl}](#rune-0576)            | authored    | Failure does not necessarily end the ritual; policy may permit another attempt. Shadow: blind repetition against a broken precondition.       |
| 0577  | `STUB` [return](#rune-0577)           | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0578  | `STUB` [round-robin](#rune-0578)      | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0579  | [schedule {Ctrl}](#rune-0579)         | authored    | Assign work to time, order, or execution slots.                                                                                               |
| 0580  | `STUB` [select {Ctrl}](#rune-0580)    | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0581  | [semaphore](#rune-0581)               | authored    | A counted gate controlling concurrent access to limited capacity.                                                                             |
| 0582  | `STUB` [sequence point](#rune-0582)   | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0583  | `STUB` [serialize access](#rune-0583) | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0584  | [signal {Ctrl}](#rune-0584)           | authored    | Emit a condition change another task may respond to.                                                                                          |
| 0585  | `STUB` [sleep](#rune-0585)            | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0586  | `STUB` [spawn {Ctrl}](#rune-0586)     | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0587  | `STUB` [step](#rune-0587)             | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0588  | `STUB` [stop](#rune-0588)             | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0589  | `STUB` [suspend](#rune-0589)          | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0590  | `STUB` [switch](#rune-0590)           | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0591  | `STUB` [sync](#rune-0591)             | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0592  | `STUB` [synchronize](#rune-0592)      | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0593  | `STUB` [task](#rune-0593)             | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0594  | `STUB` [terminate](#rune-0594)        | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0595  | `STUB` [then](#rune-0595)             | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0596  | `STUB` [throttle](#rune-0596)         | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0597  | `STUB` [tick](#rune-0597)             | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0598  | [timeout {Ctrl}](#rune-0598)          | authored    | Waiting is not free and patience must have a boundary. A timeout is a contract with reality about how long uncertainty is allowed to persist. |
| 0599  | `STUB` [timeslice](#rune-0599)        | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0600  | `STUB` [trigger](#rune-0600)          | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0601  | `STUB` [try](#rune-0601)              | stub        | A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.                                                                           |
| 0602  | `STUB` [unblock](#rune-0602)          | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0603  | `STUB` [until](#rune-0603)            | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0604  | `STUB` [wait](#rune-0604)             | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0605  | `STUB` [wake](#rune-0605)             | stub        | A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.                                                                            |
| 0606  | `STUB` [when](#rune-0606)             | stub        | A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.                                                                                   |
| 0607  | `STUB` [while](#rune-0607)            | stub        | A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.                                                                     |
| 0608  | [yield](#rune-0608)                   | authored    | Give up control now so another act may proceed.                                                                                               |

## Entries

### [0512] abort {#rune-0512}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0513] acknowledge {#rune-0513}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0514] async {#rune-0514}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Work may proceed without immediate blocking at the call site.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Work may proceed without immediate blocking at the call site.

### [0515] await {#rune-0515}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Pause until an asynchronous result becomes ready.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Pause until an asynchronous result becomes ready.

### [0516] backoff {Ctrl} {#rune-0516}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Wait longer between retries so recovery does not become attack.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Wait longer between retries so recovery does not become attack.

### [0517] barrier {Ctrl} {#rune-0517}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A synchronization point no participant may cross early.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** A synchronization point no participant may cross early.

### [0518] block {Ctrl} {#rune-0518}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0519] branch {Ctrl} {#rune-0519}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A divergence word; execution or history splits into alternate paths.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0520] break {#rune-0520}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0521] callback {#rune-0521}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0522] cancel {#rune-0522}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0523] case {#rune-0523}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0524] catch {#rune-0524}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0525] chain {#rune-0525}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0526] choose {#rune-0526}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0527] circuit breaker {#rune-0527}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Trip open after repeated failure to prevent repeated harm.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Trip open after repeated failure to prevent repeated harm.

### [0528] clause {#rune-0528}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0529] continue {#rune-0529}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0530] coroutine {#rune-0530}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A suspendable routine that can yield and later resume.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** A suspendable routine that can yield and later resume.

### [0531] countdown {#rune-0531}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0532] cycle {#rune-0532}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0533] debounce {#rune-0533}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0534] defer {Ctrl} {#rune-0534}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0535] delay {#rune-0535}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0536] dispatch {Ctrl} {#rune-0536}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0537] do {#rune-0537}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0538] else {#rune-0538}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0539] enqueue {#rune-0539}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Place work onto a queue for later handling.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Place work onto a queue for later handling.

### [0540] event loop {#rune-0540}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** The scheduler that drives nonblocking tasks and callbacks.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** The scheduler that drives nonblocking tasks and callbacks.

### [0541] fallback {Ctrl} {#rune-0541}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0542] fan-in {#rune-0542}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0543] fan-out {Ctrl} {#rune-0543}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0544] finally {#rune-0544}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0545] fire-and-forget {#rune-0545}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0546] flow control {#rune-0546}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Mechanisms that keep producers from outrunning consumers.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Mechanisms that keep producers from outrunning consumers.

### [0547] for {#rune-0547}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0548] fork {Ctrl} {#rune-0548}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0549] future {#rune-0549}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A placeholder for a value that will exist later.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** A placeholder for a value that will exist later.

### [0550] gate {#rune-0550}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** needs_sense

**Force:** A permission word; passage occurs only when conditions hold.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0551] guard {#rune-0551}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0552] halt {#rune-0552}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0553] heartbeat {Ctrl} {#rune-0553}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0554] if {#rune-0554}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0555] iterate {#rune-0555}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0556] join {Ctrl} {#rune-0556}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A union word; separate streams, sets, or histories are brought into one result.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0557] jump {#rune-0557}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0558] latch {#rune-0558}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0559] loop {#rune-0559}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0560] match {#rune-0560}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0561] mutex {#rune-0561}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Mutual exclusion for one critical region at a time.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Mutual exclusion for one critical region at a time.

### [0562] notify {#rune-0562}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0563] once {#rune-0563}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0564] parallel {Ctrl} {#rune-0564}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0565] pause {#rune-0565}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0566] poll {Ctrl} {#rune-0566}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0567] preempt {#rune-0567}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0568] priority {#rune-0568}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0569] process {Ctrl} {#rune-0569}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sovereignty word; an executing program with its own protected address space.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0570] promise {#rune-0570}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0571] queue {Ctrl} {#rune-0571}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Ordered holding area that decouples production from consumption.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Ordered holding area that decouples production from consumption.

### [0572] race window {#rune-0572}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0573] recurse {#rune-0573}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0574] repeat {#rune-0574}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0575] reserve {#rune-0575}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0576] retry {Ctrl} {#rune-0576}

**Status:** canonical (major canon, pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Failure does not necessarily end the ritual; policy may permit another attempt.

**Shadow:** blind repetition against a broken precondition.

**Pocket gloss:** Try again under policy rather than treating one failure as final.

### [0577] return {#rune-0577}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0578] round-robin {#rune-0578}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0579] schedule {Ctrl} {#rune-0579}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Assign work to time, order, or execution slots.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Assign work to time, order, or execution slots.

### [0580] select {Ctrl} {#rune-0580}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0581] semaphore {#rune-0581}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** A counted gate controlling concurrent access to limited capacity.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** A counted gate controlling concurrent access to limited capacity.

### [0582] sequence point {#rune-0582}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0583] serialize access {#rune-0583}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0584] signal {Ctrl} {#rune-0584}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Emit a condition change another task may respond to.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Emit a condition change another task may respond to.

### [0585] sleep {#rune-0585}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0586] spawn {Ctrl} {#rune-0586}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0587] step {#rune-0587}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0588] stop {#rune-0588}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0589] suspend {#rune-0589}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0590] switch {#rune-0590}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0591] sync {#rune-0591}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0592] synchronize {#rune-0592}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0593] task {#rune-0593}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0594] terminate {#rune-0594}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0595] then {#rune-0595}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0596] throttle {#rune-0596}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0597] tick {#rune-0597}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0598] timeout {Ctrl} {#rune-0598}

**Status:** canonical (major canon, pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Waiting is not free and patience must have a boundary. A timeout is a contract with reality about how long uncertainty is allowed to persist.

**Shadow:** when a timeout hides whether the operation failed, succeeded late, or is still running.

**Pocket gloss:** A declared limit on how long uncertainty may persist.

### [0599] timeslice {#rune-0599}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0600] trigger {#rune-0600}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0601] try {#rune-0601}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A coordination word; it manages concurrency, interruption, or flow.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0602] unblock {#rune-0602}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0603] until {#rune-0603}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0604] wait {#rune-0604}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0605] wake {#rune-0605}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A tempo-word; it governs order, waiting, branching, or repetition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0606] when {#rune-0606}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A time-binding word; it changes when an action may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0607] while {#rune-0607}

**Status:** canonical

**Completion:** stub

**Force:** A sequencing word; it decides what happens next and under what condition.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

### [0608] yield {#rune-0608}

**Status:** canonical (pocket canon)

**Completion:** authored

**Force:** Give up control now so another act may proceed.

**Shadow:** timing assumptions can turn coordination into stalls, races, retries, or dead paths.

**Pocket gloss:** Give up control now so another act may proceed.
